author: Niche Gamer
text:
Lovecraftian fishing horror Dreadmoor launches in Q4 2026 One of the more intriguing indie games shown during Day of the Devs was Dreadmoor, an upcoming first-person fishing adventure from newcomer studio Dream Dock. At first glance, it might remind you of Dredge, but Dreadmoor leans much harder into survival mechanics and horror. Set in a flooded post-apocalyptic world, you explore decaying coastlines, abandoned […]

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Nidhogg devs announce platforming action game Blood Dungeon If you’ve ever wondered what would happen if Vampire Survivors and Spelunky had a very chaotic child together, newly announced game Blood Dungeon could give you the answer. Developed by Messhof, the studio best known for Nidhogg, Blood Dungeon combines automatic shooting with fast-paced platforming. Instead of worrying about aiming, you’ll spend your time wall-climbing, […]

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Tenebris Somnia gets October 2026 release date Developed by Andrés Borghi and Saibot Studios and published by New Blood Interactive, Tenebris Somnia mixes retro-inspired pixel art gameplay with live-action cutscenes featuring real actors, practical effects, and some genuinely unsettling creature designs. The story follows Julia, a woman haunted by terrifying nightmares involving her ex-boyfriend and monstrous creatures. Things quickly spiral out of […]

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Cozy musical adventure MR. RECORDS announced Revealed during the Day of the Devs showcase, MR. RECORDS is a rhythm adventure that combines music, storytelling, and a cozy record shop into one surprisingly heartfelt package. You play as George, an older man who finally decides to pursue his dream of opening a vinyl store after years of living a routine life. During […]

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Backrooms director Kane Parsons rejects gen AI in new comments Backrooms director Kane Parsons is not on board with the Hollywood trend of embracing AI in the arts. While Parsons is well known for being anti-AI, he reiterated the comments while speaking with the Australian. “If I could snap my fingers and make generative AI disappear forever, I probably would” Parsons said. “Creatively, I get […]

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Threads of Time gets new trailer highlighting the Needle timeship Developed by Canadian studio Riyo Games, upcoming turn-based RPG Threads of Time made another appearance during Day of the Devs, this time spotlighting The Needle, a massive timeship that serves as the player’s gateway across different eras. The adventure takes you from prehistoric lands filled with dinosaurs to medieval kingdoms, futuristic cyberpunk cities, and even […]

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Into the Unwell gets new Day of the Devs trailer Developed by She Was Such A Good Horse and published by Coffee Stain Publishing, co-op action roguelite Into the Unwell throws you into a surreal world inspired by classic rubber-hose animation.  You can tackle runs solo or team up with up to two friends while controlling a cast of interesting characters. The latest trailer shown […]

author: Niche Gamer
text:
33 Immortals finally leaves early access next week Developer Thunder Lotus Games announced their co-op action roguelike 33 Immortals will leave Early Access next month. 33 Immortals is leaving early access on June 10th for Xbox Series X|S and PC via Steam, Epic Games Store, and the Microsoft Store. If you haven’t been keeping an eye on it, 33 Immortals stands out for […]

text:
tinyBuild announces multiplayer crafting zombie survival game Last Harbor Publisher and developer tinyBuild has announced Last Harbor, a new multiplayer, open-world zombie survival crafting game. Last Harbor is in development for Windows PC (Steam), though a release date wasn’t announced. Here’s a rundown on the game, plus its reveal trailer: Last Harbor is a persistent open-world, multiplayer, survival crafting game set in a post-apocalyptic […]

text:
N Plus Infinity Times Two announced for PC and consoles After years of believing N++ would be the final chapter in the series, Metanet Software is returning with N Plus Infinity Times Two, a brand-new entry in the long-running ninja platforming franchise. Scheduled to launch in 2027 for PC via Steam, PS5, Xbox Series X|S, and Nintendo Switch 2, the game takes the precise movement […]

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Monster Hunter Wilds coming to Switch 2 Capcom has announced Monster Hunter Wilds is coming to Nintendo Switch 2. While details are scant, the new Switch 2 port for Monster Hunter Wilds is already in development, more info is coming later. HITMAN Classic Trilogy Remastered is in development for PC (Steam), Xbox Series X|S, and PS5 with a release set for 2027. text:
Street Fighter 6 reveals Year 4 DLC characters including Tifa from Final Fantasy VII Capcom announced Street Fighter 6 Year 4 DLC characters, the latest additions to their flagship fighting game. The new DLC characters will start releasing this summer with Yasmine, then Arjun in fall, then guest character Tifa in early 2027, and finally Bosch in 2027.
